detail.subject: Issue with my Pinterest account — ad review delay
detail.__agent_response_summary: I see your ad has been in review for 72 hours, which is outside our normal 24-hour window. I've escalated it to our ads review team for priority processing. The delay was caused by a backlog in our creative review queue. You should receive an approval or feedback within the next 6 hours.
